title: MyMessage
body:
✨ Use MiniMessage anywhere, whatever! ✨


🚀 Features 🚀

⚡ Lightweight & Fast – Efficient packet interception ensures minimal impact on server performance.

🌍 MiniMessage Anywhere – Use MiniMessage in the messages of any plugin, no matter what!

🎨 Advanced MiniMessage Support – Transforms MiniMessage tags seamlessly while preserving original formatting.

🧩 Custom Tag System – Use built-in tags (PlaceholderAPI, smallcaps, etc) or create your own. Learn more on the wiki.

🧱 Custom Placeholders – Create your own placeholders! More info on the wiki.


💬 Intercepts Multiple Message Types:

📩 System messages (all messages sent to the player).

💬 Player chat messages.

🏷️ Titles & Subtitles.

🎯 Action Bar messages.

🎛️ BossBars (v1.0.3).


🛠️ Maintains Original Styling – Hover events, click events, and more are preserved.

🧪 Configurable Prefix Detection – Only transform messages with a prefix from config.yml.

📦 PlaceholderAPI Integration – Supports dynamic content with PlaceholderAPI.

🔓 Open Source – Fully open for contribution and customization.


📌 Found a bug or have a request? Report it on the issues page 😉
